summary: Assert that every finite sample of a field/image lies within [min, max]. A violation fails the assertion and records the out-of-range count, the worst (furthest-out) value, and its pixel.

inputs.name: resource
inputs.doc: The field/image whose samples must lie within [min, max].

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The assertion verdict: pass/fail plus the out-of-range count, worst value, and worst pixel.

params.name: min
params.doc: The inclusive lower bound every sample must meet.

params.name: max
params.doc: The inclusive upper bound every sample must meet (>= min).

params.name: severity
params.doc: How a violation affects the run: `error` fails the run, `warning` marks the evidence, `metric` never fails.
